$comment: Client-agnostic descriptor for the Cipher & Row freight verification MCP server. Any MCP client that speaks the Streamable HTTP transport can use these values. Authentication is standard OAuth 2.1 + PKCE with Dynamic Client Registration (RFC 7591); a compliant client discovers everything it needs from the two metadata documents below, so no static credentials are required. Alternatively, send a Cipher & Row API key as an Authorization: Bearer header.
name: cipher-and-row
description: AI-agent carrier and broker vetting for freight. Live FMCSA verification, multi-signal 0-100 trust scores, fraud and identity signals, and a monitored partner watchlist. Read-only + watchlist; no load posting or payments.
